name: Playtomic
description: Full Playtomic access for padel, tennis, and futsal players. Search clubs and availability, find open matches to join, read your own profile, level, stats, history, and recommendations. 13 tools, email + password auth with automatic JWT refresh.
instructions:
## Authentication (handled automatically)

Playtomic uses email + password to mint a ~1-hour JWT. The AnythingMCP `LOGIN_TOKEN` engine handles login, caching, and refresh:

1. `POST https://app.playtomic.io/api/v3/auth/login` with `{ email, password, requested_user_roles: ["ROLE_CUSTOMER"] }`.
2. The response contains `access_token` (JWT, ~1h TTL) and `refresh_token` (~60d).
3. Every tool call attaches `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`.
4. The engine proactively re-logs in 60 s before expiry and on any `401`. Tokens are cached encrypted in the `connector_auth_cache` DB table.

## Credentials

- `PLAYTOMIC_EMAIL` â€” your Playtomic account email.
- `PLAYTOMIC_PASSWORD` â€” your plain account password. Stored encrypted; only sent over TLS to Playtomic's login endpoint.

## When dedicated tools are not enough

The 13 tools below cover the common Playtomic workflows. Anything not exposed (e.g. accepting a join request, creating a match, paying for a booking) requires Playtomic's mobile app â€” there is no documented public booking write API and we deliberately don't expose write endpoints.

## Public vs full connector

If you only want to **search clubs and check availability** (no account, no personal data), use the `playtomic-public` connector instead â€” same 4 read tools but no credentials needed.

## Pricing notes

- `price` is a string like `"48 EUR"` â€” parse amount + currency.
- The same `start_time` may appear with several `duration` values (60/90/120 min). These are alternative bookings of the same slot, not separate free slots.
- `duration` is in **minutes**.
- If your account has linked club memberships, pricing returned by `playtomic_get_availability` reflects your member discount.

## Time handling

- `local_start_min` / `local_start_max` are naive ISO-8601 in the **tenant's** local timezone (see `tenant.address.timezone`, e.g. `Europe/Berlin`). For a full day use `T00:00:00` â†’ `T23:59:59` on the same date.
- Match/course/tournament date filters use the same naive ISO format unless otherwise noted.

## Joining availability to courts

Every availability row has a `resource_id`. Map it back to `tenant.resources[]` (from `playtomic_get_tenant`) to know court name, indoor/outdoor, single/double, surface.

## Levels & match recommendations

- `level_value` is your Playtomic skill rating (typically 0â€“7). `level_confidence` reflects how many matches the rating is based on.
- `playtomic_match_recommendations` returns open matches at your level near a coordinate. Empty array = no recommendations right now (it's normal).

## Rate limits

Playtomic has no published SLA. Keep request volume reasonable (â‰¤1 req/s steady state). The engine auto-handles `401` with a retry-after-relogin and gives up after one retry â€” if you see `401` twice, check that your credentials are correct.

## Stability

This is an undocumented/internal API reverse-engineered from the Playtomic iOS app. Endpoints can change without notice. If a tool starts failing, check the AnythingMCP docs for a connector update.

## Useful starter prompts

- "Find open padel matches at my level near Milan this weekend." â†’ `playtomic_match_recommendations`
- "What's my current padel level on Playtomic?" â†’ `playtomic_get_my_level`
- "How many padel matches have I won this year?" â†’ `playtomic_get_my_stats`
- "At which clubs do I play the most?" â†’ `playtomic_get_top_clubs`
- "Show me free crystal-court slots tomorrow afternoon within 20 km of my home." â†’ `playtomic_search_tenants` + `playtomic_get_availability`
- "Are there any padel tournaments coming up near Barcelona?" â†’ `playtomic_list_tournaments`

tools.name: playtomic_search_tenants
tools.description: Search Playtomic clubs (tenants) â€” typically by geo coordinate + radius. Returns active clubs with their courts (`resources[]`), address, timezone, images. Use this first to find clubs near a city; pass `tenant_id` values into `playtomic_get_availability` to check free slots.

coordinate.description: Geo center as `lat,lon` (e.g. `48.0708,7.9006`). Required for geo search.

radius.description: Search radius in meters. Default 50000 (50 km).

tools.name: playtomic_get_tenant
tools.description: Get full detail of a single Playtomic club by `tenant_id` (UUID) â€” including all courts, opening info, contact, gallery. Use after `playtomic_search_tenants` or to join availability rows to court metadata.

tools.name: playtomic_get_availability
tools.description: Read free court slots for a given day at one or more clubs. With this connector pricing reflects your account (member discounts if any). Returns an array, one entry per court, each with `slots[]` of `{ start_time, duration (min), price (string e.g. "48 EUR") }`.

tenant_id.description: One tenant UUID, or several comma-separated (e.g. `id1,id2,id3`).

local_start_min.description: Naive ISO-8601 lower bound in tenant local time, e.g. `2026-05-23T00:00:00`.

tools.name: playtomic_get_sport_configuration
tools.description: Read Playtomic's canonical sport configuration â€” enums for allowed durations, court properties (indoor/outdoor/roofed, single/double, wall/crystal/panoramic), supported sports. Reference data; rarely changes.

tools.name: playtomic_get_my_profile
tools.description: Full profile of the authenticated user â€” name, email, phone, communications language, `linked_accounts` per club, accepted commercial/privacy flags. Useful as a health check.

tools.name: playtomic_get_my_level
tools.description: Your Playtomic skill level per sport â€” `level_value` (typically 0â€“7), `level_confidence` (matches-based confidence), `status`. Pass `with_history=true` to include historical level changes.

tools.name: playtomic_get_my_stats
tools.description: Lifetime match results for the authenticated user in a given sport â€” `played`, `won`, `lost`, `drawn`, `validating`, `rejected`.

tools.name: playtomic_get_top_clubs
tools.description: Clubs where the authenticated user plays most often (all-time or last 3 months). Returns `[{ tenant_id, count }]` ordered by frequency. Enrich with `playtomic_get_tenant` to get names.

last_three_months_only.description: Restrict to last 3 months (uses the `/last_three_months` variant). Default false (all-time).

tools.name: playtomic_find_open_matches
tools.description: Search open matches in a date window (people looking for partners). Filter by `match_status` and `join_request_status`. Useful with phrases like 'show me open padel matches this weekend at my level'.

after_end_date.description: Naive ISO-8601 lower bound on match end date (e.g. `2026-05-23T00:00:00`).

before_end_date.description: Naive ISO-8601 upper bound on match end date.

tools.name: playtomic_get_match
tools.description: Full detail of a single match by `match_id` â€” teams, players, location/tenant, lock_id, status.

tools.name: playtomic_match_recommendations
tools.description: Playtomic's algorithmic match recommendations for the authenticated user, given a geo center. Returns open matches at the user's level near the coordinate. Empty array = no recommendations right now.

tools.name: playtomic_list_tournaments
tools.description: List tournaments visible to the authenticated user, filtered by start date and status.

to_start_date.description: Upper bound (naive ISO-8601) on tournament start.

tools.name: playtomic_list_leagues
tools.description: List open leagues near a coordinate, optionally for a sport and skill level.

for_level.description: Your level (e.g. 3.5) â€” Playtomic filters leagues you're eligible for.
